audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for Lamb on Zion, 144,000 song, three messengers, Babylon warning, harvest imagery, endurance.

verses.restored: And I saw, and look, the Lamb standing on Mount Zion, and with him one hundred forty-four thousand having his name and his Father's name written on their foreheads.
I heard voice from heaven like sound of many waters and great thunder, and voice like harpists playing harps.
They sing as new song before throne and living creatures and elders, and no one could learn song except the one hundred forty-four thousand purchased from earth.
These are those not defiled with women, for they are virgins; these follow the Lamb wherever he goes; these were purchased from humans as firstfruit to Divine and Lamb.
In their mouth no lie was found; they are blameless.
I saw another messenger flying in mid-heaven, having age-long good news to announce to those dwelling on earth, every nation, tribe, tongue, and people.
He says with great voice: Revere the Divine and give him glory, because hour of his judgment came; worship the One making heaven, earth, sea, and springs of waters.
Another second messenger followed, saying: Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great, who made all nations drink from wine of passion of her sexual misuse.
Another third messenger followed, saying with great voice: If anyone worships beast and its image and receives mark on forehead or hand,
that one also will drink from wine of wrath of Divine mixed unmixed in cup of his anger, and will be tested in fire and sulfur before holy messengers and Lamb.
The smoke of their testing goes up into ages of ages, and they have no rest day and night, those worshiping beast and its image and whoever receives mark of its name.
Here is endurance of holy ones, those keeping commands of Divine and trust of Jesus.
I heard voice from heaven saying: Write: Blessed are dead ones dying in Lord from now. Yes, says Spirit, so they will rest from labors, for their works follow with them.
And I saw, and look, a white cloud, and on the cloud one seated like son of human, having golden crown on head and sharp sickle in hand.
Another messenger came from temple, crying with great voice to the One sitting on cloud: Send your sickle and reap, because hour to reap came, because harvest of earth was dried/ripe.
The One sitting on cloud cast his sickle upon earth, and earth was harvested.
Another messenger came from temple in heaven, also having sharp sickle.
Another messenger from altar, having authority over fire, called with great voice to the one with sharp sickle: Send your sharp sickle and gather clusters of vine of earth, because grapes are ripe.
The messenger cast his sickle into earth and gathered vine of earth and cast into great winepress of wrath of Divine.
The winepress was trodden outside city, and blood/life came out from winepress up to bridles of horses, for one thousand six hundred stadia.

translation_notes: Virgin/undefiled imagery is symbolic purity/fidelity language; it must not imply women defile men.
Babylon is imperial/corrupt system imagery, not a random modern city label.
Harvest/winepress imagery is apocalyptic judgment symbolism; do not literalize for violence.
safety_note: Revelation 14 contains severe symbolic judgment. Keep the focus on allegiance, truthfulness, endurance, and resistance to beast/Babylon systems, not fear or dehumanization.
